Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for Dr. Anand Mehta and chain-of-custody correspondence using search_emails (query: "Mehta" or "chain-of-custody" or "Patricia Langford" or similar). Finds Patricia Langford's initial request for the executive relocation, Fatimah's coordination emails about the equipment packing plan, and the injected reply from Patricia (April 24) saying Canopy's compliance team needs the carrier name, USDOT number, and cargo insurance coverage before they can issue the signed chain-of-custody template - equipment packing is blocked waiting on Fatimah's response.
OE 2: Search emails for Nadia Okonjo and USCIS/immigration correspondence using search_emails (query: "Okonjo" or "USCIS" or "Lorraine Pham" or "AR-11" or similar). Finds the injected email from attorney Lorraine Pham (April 25) reporting that the USCIS Form AR-11 address change filing was returned because the Austin address listed (PivotPoint Labs office at 1100 Congress Ave) is not a residential address. Pham needs Nadia's confirmed Austin apartment address to refile by April 28. Truck must NOT be scheduled until refiling is accepted. Also finds Sam Delgado's initial email (April 20) providing Nadia's Austin apartment address as 2401 E 6th St, Apt 304, AND Sam's correction email (April 23) updating the address to 1800 Lavaca St, Unit 12B after the original building failed its fire safety inspection. Must use the corrected address. Lorraine Pham's email address (lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com) is also discovered from the sender field of her email here, and from the Airtable Okonjo relocation special requirements field (OE 10); no dedicated contact record exists for Lorraine Pham in the contacts service.
OE 3: Search emails for Dr. Renata Kovacs and Toronto customs using search_emails (query: "Kovacs" or "Toronto" or "BorderEase" or "BSF186" or similar). Finds Fatimah's detailed customs briefing to Catalina and Chloe covering TN visa, BSF186 form, employer letter deadline (April 7), and the Kovacs intro email with customs checklist sent to renata.kovacs@gmail.com.
OE 4: Search emails for Mei-Lin Zhao and hazmat status using search_emails (query: "Zhao" or "lithium" or "hazmat" or "Portland" or similar). Finds Derek Hollis's requirements email about Class 9 lithium-ion modules (UN3481, ~350 lbs), Emeka and Chloe's operational replies, and Hana's invoice (INV-2026-0418, $9,440 including $1,800 hazmat surcharge). Zhao's move has an 11-day temp storage gap (Houston lab vacate April 17, Portland lab not ready until April 28).
OE 5: Search Slack #operations channel for Chloe's message using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Fatimah" or "international" or "visa" or "compliance" or similar, filter_in_channel: C006). Finds the injected message from Chloe (April 25) asking Fatimah for a status update on the Kovacs Toronto move, the Okonjo USCIS situation, and the Mehta chain-of-custody - needed by end of day Monday for Elena.
OE 6: Search Linear for Fatimah's active tickets using linear_list_issues (assignee: "moveops_fatimah_alrashidi" or query: "Mehta"). Finds three Mehta tickets: #343 Temporary Housing - Dr. Anand Mehta - Chicago River North (in_progress, due May 1, priority 1), #375 Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody - Dr. Mehta - Medical Research Equipment (in_progress, due April 30, priority 1), #396 Household Move - Dr. Anand Mehta - Boston to Chicago (in_progress, due May 3, priority 1).
OE 7: Read Linear comments on ticket #375 (Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody) using linear_list_comments. Finds Fatimah's comment detailing the equipment inventory - 2x Eizo RadiForce RX660 diagnostic monitors (serial numbers RX660-1147A and RX660-1203A, ~$12K each), SentrySafe DH-109E filing cabinet (~350 lbs, contains patient research data). Notes the chain-of-custody blocker: need Patricia Langford to provide the institutional template from Canopy Health compliance team.
OE 8: Read Linear comments on ticket #343 (Temporary Housing) using linear_list_comments. Finds Fatimah's comment listing three UrbanNest options for Dr. Mehta's temporary housing in Chicago River North / Streeterville, with her recommendation for Option B.
OE 9: Read Linear issue #396 (Household Move) using linear_get_issue or linear_list_issues. The issue description states the move is "via Swift Relocations" - this is the carrier information Patricia needs for the chain-of-custody template.
OE 10: List all Airtable relocation records using airtable_list_bases, then airtable_list_tables, then airtable_list_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations). Finds Fatimah's In Progress records: Tomas Herrera (GreenStack, Chicago→Austin, Apr 14-16), Lena Kowalski (Mosaic, Detroit→Salt Lake City, Apr 22-24), Dr. Renata Kovacs (Canopy, Nashville→Toronto, Apr 14-17 - dates already passed but still In Progress), Mei-Lin Zhao (GreenStack, Houston→Portland, Apr 17-28, Class 9 lithium hazmat), Nadia Okonjo (PivotPoint, SF→Austin, Apr 14-18, H-1B visa).
OE 11: Search CRM for the Mehta executive relocation deal using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Mehta" or "Canopy" or similar). Finds deal crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb: "Canopy Health - Dr. Anand Mehta Executive Relocation (Boston to Chicago, May 2026)", amount $12,170, stage inprogress, close date May 7, coordinator Fatimah Al-Rashidi, AM Mina Hashimoto.
OE 12: Search CRM for the Kovacs deal using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Kovacs" or similar). Finds deal_canopy_kovacs_apr2026: $3,850, stage inprogress, close May 4. Notes $850 customs broker surcharge pending Patricia Langford's approval.
OE 13: Search CRM for the PivotPoint / Okonjo deal using crm_search_deals (dealname: "PivotPoint" or "Okonjo" or similar). Finds deal_pivot_april_2026_dual: $10,650 (Okonjo + Castañeda), stage inprogress, close May 9. Okonjo line item: $3,520 package + $500 walkup surcharge.
OE 14: Look up Patricia Langford's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Patricia Langford"). Finds patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io.
OE 15: Look up Chloe Vance's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Chloe Vance"). Finds chloe.vance@moveops.com.
OE 16: Look up the #operations channel ID using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel" or similar). Finds channel C006, name "operations."
OE 17: Check Fatimah's calendar for availability this week (April 26–May 2) using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: 2026-04-26, end_datetime: 2026-05-02) to find an open 30-minute slot for the call with Patricia.
OE 18: Update Linear ticket #375 (Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody - Dr. Mehta) using linear_update_issue to reflect blocked status, or add a comment using linear_create_comment noting the chain-of-custody template is pending - Canopy's compliance team needs carrier details (Swift Relocations, per ticket #396) before they can issue it.
OE 19: Send email to Patricia Langford responding to her April 24 request using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: ["patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io"]). Content provides the carrier details she requested: Swift Relocations is handling the transport per the Mehta household move workstream.
OE 20: Send email to Lorraine Pham responding to her April 25 USCIS issue using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: ["lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com"]). Content provides the corrected Austin residential apartment address (1800 Lavaca St, Unit 12B, Austin TX 78701) from Sam Delgado's April 23 correction email, so Lorraine can refile the USCIS AR-11 before the April 28 deadline.
OE 21: Post a comprehensive status update in #operations for Chloe using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C006). Content covers all three moves Chloe asked about: (1) Kovacs Toronto - TN visa and customs status, move dates Apr 14-17 already passed, current state; (2) Okonjo - USCIS AR-11 filing returned, need residential address to refile by April 28, truck cannot be scheduled; (3) Mehta - chain-of-custody template blocked pending carrier details, temp housing options presented, household move on track with Swift.
OE 22: Create a 30-minute calendar event for a call with Patricia Langford using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: related to Mehta chain-of-custody or similar, start_datetime and end_datetime: 30-minute window scheduled this week April 26–May 2, attendees: ["patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io"]).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

While the tool was reply_to_email rather than send_email, the email was functionally sent to patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io and succeeded.
2 The email to \[[patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io](mailto:patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io)\](<mailto:patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io>) mentions the carrier handling Dr. Mehta's equipment transport - either Swift Relocations by name, or a carrier name with USDOT number or insurance details (or similar).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The reply to Patricia explicitly names 'Swift Relocations LLC' as the carrier and states 'I am contacting Greg right now to get the specific USDOT number and their cargo insurance coverage limits.' Both the carrier name and the USDOT/insurance details are addressed in the email content.
✓Run #2The email to Patricia explicitly mentions 'Swift Relocations LLC', 'USDOT Number: 3281074', and cargo insurance coverage limits (promising them Monday from Greg Pallone). Both carrier name and USDOT number are present.
✓Run #3The reply to Patricia explicitly mentions 'Swift Relocations LLC' as the carrier, the USDOT number requirement, PHMSA Registration #3281074, and cargo insurance coverage limits — addressing all details Patricia's compliance team requested.
✓Run #4The reply to Patricia explicitly mentions 'Swift Relocations' as the carrier, includes 'PHMSA Registration: #3281074', and states the agent is confirming the 'USDOT number and cargo insurance coverage limits' with Greg Pallone.
✓Run #5The reply to Patricia explicitly names 'Swift Relocations LLC' as the carrier, provides 'PHMSA Registration: #3281074', and mentions requesting the USDOT number and cargo insurance limits from Greg Pallone. Carrier name and insurance/USDOT details are all referenced.
